title: I Blew 3 Funded Accounts Before Learning This One Thing | R2F Trading 2026
description: Two years of losses. Three blown funded accounts. Then the R2F Trading system showed me the one mistake killing every trade. If you're stuck in 2026 and can't figure out why your setups keep failing — this is for you. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT breakdowns. Link in bio → r2ftrading.com
script: Three funded accounts. Gone. Same week. I thought I knew ICT trading. Every setup looked perfect. Order blocks. Fair value gaps. Clean structure. Still stopped out. Two years of this. $11,000 in challenge fees. I almost quit in March 2026. Then the R2F Trading system showed me something brutal. I was trading the setup. Not the liquidity behind it. Smart money sweeps liquidity FIRST. Then fills the fair value gap. I was entering before the sweep. Every. Single. Time. One rule change. Wait for the sweep. Confirm the FVG. Next funded account — passed in 9 days. Follow R2F Trading. We post setups like this every single day. r2ftrading.com — link in bio.
